long_chain: Change the lighting to a dramatic sunset, casting warm orange and pink hues across the sky and the stone surface of the Elizabeth Tower.
Add dark, stormy clouds gathering around the spire of the tower, contrasting with the warm sunset light.
Introduce heavy rain falling across the scene, creating wet reflections on the clock faces and the stone ledges.
Transition the time to night, illuminating the clock faces with a bright blue glow and adding spotlights at the base of the tower.
Apply a watercolor painting style to the image, softening the edges of the tower and blending the night lights into the paper texture.
Transform the tower's material to look like it is made of intricate clockwork gears and brass mechanisms, while maintaining the original silhouette.
Change the background to a deep space nebula with swirling purple and blue gases, making the clockwork tower appear to float in the cosmos.
Add glowing neon cyan lines tracing the architectural edges of the clockwork tower for a cyberpunk aesthetic.
Surround the tower with floating holographic data screens and digital particles in the space background.
Apply a low-poly 3D render style to the entire scene, simplifying the geometry of the clockwork tower and the holographic elements into faceted shapes.
